description: Evaluations for agents-update skill - AGENTS.md optimization

evals.prompt: Check if agents-update skill has required files: SKILL.md, tests/test_skill.sh, and evals/evals.json
Verify SKILL.md has valid frontmatter with name, description, and version fields
evals.expected_output: Frontmatter contains all required fields: name, description, version

evals.prompt: Check that SKILL.md is under 250 lines
Verify section mapping table exists in SKILL.md
evals.expected_output: Section Mapping section is documented with table

evals.prompt: Check that Workflow and Quality Gates sections exist
evals.expected_output: Both Workflow and Quality Gates sections are present

evals.prompt: Verify skill has code examples in markdown blocks
evals.expected_output: At least one code block exists in SKILL.md

evals.prompt: Apply skill to optimize AGENTS.md and verify results are under 140 lines with proper cross-references
evals.expected_output: AGENTS.md is optimized to 72 lines with 15 cross-references to agents-docs/
criteria: AGENTS.md line count reduced to ≤140 lines
All migrated sections have destination files
AGENTS.md still functional as quick reference
